name: AutoTrader EchoPark Automotive 400
comments: William Byron won the 19th running of the AutoTrader EchoPark Automotive 400 at Texas Motor Speedway, his 10th victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following car dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reasons indicated: No. 78 (unapproved adjustments).
